question.label: Priority clarity
question.name: What are you actually focused on this week, and why those things?
question.description: Surfaces whether priorities are crisp or vague; whether they match what you thought.

answer: Next I want to hand off one stream end-to-end and stay out of the middle.

assessment.note: Names a specific near-term priority and a clear operating shift toward delegation, showing strong clarity and forward momentum; [THREAD-DEFERRED-WINDDOWN] 'hand off one stream end-to-end' could be worth unpacking next session.

new_queue.label: Closer next step
new_queue.name: Given what we’ve covered, where do you want to focus first?

new_queue.label: Keep or delegate
new_queue.name: What do you think only you should own right now?

history.answer_excerpt: I am proud of the outcomes, but the pace should not be normal.
I still do not get enough substantive feedback on key decisions.
The last stretch shipped, but it was heavier than I made it sound.
Late nights came from carrying decision bottlenecks and final reviews.
Some of that work could have moved to the team sooner.

I want clearer ownership boundaries so I am not default escalation.
Next I want to hand off one stream end-to-end and stay out of the middle.
